MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up/Partition Action Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Duucette
Frannie Mok, Esq. for Plaintiff: Le N,. Huynh, Trustee of The Le N. Huynh Linving Trust.
Plaintiff's Witness: Le N. Huynh, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, matter is put over to Nov. 27, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218 for Ms. Mok to file brief on the proposed appointment of a Referee.
